programme.title: A Thousand Years of Shaanxi Cuisine S2 - EP 7

Delicacies from northern Shaanxi, Guanzhong, southern Shaanxi and other places will make its way into the programme, from the delicacies passed down in the palace of the ancient capital to the street corners of the market. The snacks, whose taste has been circulating for thousands of years, are never bound by the concept of superiority and inferiority.

programme.title: Uniquely Ours - EP 9
programme.desc: Jiayi's advances and confession are met with Minchen's tactful rejection. Yuling gets scolded by Jiahui for getting scammed in a group purchase. programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 10
programme.desc: Penghu boasts stunning basalt and volcanic landscapes, rich with natural and marine treasures. In this episode, the team explores its most unique hidden gems - from rare columnar basalt cliffs and dense stone weir clusters to local delicacies like peanuts stir-fried on cowfish-stone stoves. They dive into Penghu’s blend of ocean beauty and wartime heritage, ending their adventure with an offshore quest to find traces of ancient whales.

Strangely, slowly but surely, Bintang actually likes Alya because of her kindness, cheerfulness, and beauty. However, Alya still does not know that Bintang is pretending to be the one who is matched with her.

programme.title: Gara Gara Gecko No Jomblo Jomblo
programme.desc: A beautiful girl (Nabila Zavira) has a phobia of geckos. That day, a gecko fell on her, but she doesn't believe in superstition and will still go to Jakarta, even though her mother forbids it. However, upon arriving in Jakarta, the girl meets a boss (Rizky Alatas) who has a pet reptile named Gecko. From there, the girl works around while looking after Gecko. Unfortunately, when the girl looks for Gecko in the cashier's drawer, she is suspected of stealing.

Until one night, Rere finally tries to steal a book owned by Farhan and Rere succeeds in stealing and exchanging Farhan's book with another.

programme.desc: Determined to avoid her wedding with Bimo, Julia flees her home on a trail bike. She enlists her best friend, Iis, to help stage her disappearance. A desperate Bimo chases her in a pickup truck, shouting for her to stop as Julia races toward her freedom.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 9
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 155
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: REBUTAN HATI MISS UNI CORN
programme.desc: NETTY and SARA are two best friends who have been together since childhood. They do everything together. They have the same taste in everything, from matching clothes to being mistaken for sisters. Netty's mother also considers Sara as her own child, especially since Sara is an orphan who lives with her elderly uncle. Sara's uncle owns a corn farm that supplies corn for grilling at the peak. Meanwhile, Netty's mother runs an Indomie noodle stall, where Netty also works.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 207
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Coba-Coba Cintanya Bikin Terjaga-Jaga
programme.desc: Ryan (Kevin Hillers) is a struggling single father who sells toys to survive. When a famous influencer, Rosa (Valerie Ivanka), tries to help his child cross the street, a paranoid Ryan films the encounter and accuses her of kidnapping. The video goes viral, ruining Rosa’s reputation. To save her career, Rosa’s manager orders her to get close to Ryan and convince him to clear her name.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 9
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: REBUT PACAR SAHABAT? ASIAAAAP!
programme.desc: Ara (Debi Sagita) is about to get married, but suddenly her best friend faints because she doesn't want Ara to marry her dream guy, Joni (Aditya Suryo). In the end, because she loves her best friend, Ara runs away to Sam's (Fauzan Nasrul) car. Ara is the daughter of a poor widow who works as a maid. She tries to steal her best friend's boyfriend, who is also the son of her mother's employer, using all sorts of funny methods, and eventually tries to reunite them.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 156
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Si Manis Jembatan Perasaan Aku dan Kamu
programme.desc: In need of money, Syafira (Rachquel Nesia) takes a unique job in Yogyakarta as a 'Kuntilanak' cosplayer to scare young couples at the beach. During her shift, she accidentally crashes into a visitor named El (Fendy Chow). El is terrified when Syafira’s wig ends up on his head, and even more shocked when she deadpans that it’s 'ghost hair

programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Idolanya Kaum Mendang Mending Jangan Ya Dek Ya!!
programme.desc: Dadang (Jeff Smith) is so obsessed with dangdut singer Jenita Janet that he neglects his work, infuriating his mother. He hitches a ride on a truck to Jakarta to meet his idol, unaware that a local girl named Lilis (Raisya Bawazier) has sneaked along to see the National Monument (Monas). Lilis’s presence turns Dadang’s simple mission into a chaotic disaster.

programme.title: Makan Seblak Pake Nangka, Meski Galak Aku Tetap Suka
programme.desc: Naya has always been a loyal fan of an artist named Rama. She spends hours watching his movies and following his latest news on social media. She has no idea that their paths will cross in the most unexpected way. One sunny day, while Naya was busy selling goods, Rama accidentally bumped into her cart. Stunned and surprised, Naya couldn't believe her eyes. The person she admired was standing right in front of her.

programme.title: AKSOBHNYA

programme.title: Dek Jamu Kuat Cintaku Syenggol Dong
programme.desc: Wini (Larasati Nugroho) makes a living selling traditional herbal medicine (jamu) and pecel in her village. Her life takes a turn when a foreign tourist named Jason (Andrew Andika) falls in love with the village’s scenery and decides to stay at her house, learning about local life through Wini.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 11
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. programme.title: AKSOBHNYA

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 38
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 7
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 16
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 10
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 13
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 5
programme.desc: Menampilkan dua pasukan yang terdiri daripada ahli kelab peminat selebriti tempatan bersaing di antara satu sama lain bagi mendapatkan takhta fan fanatik.

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 8
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: Biniku Ninja - EP 15
programme.desc: Azlan berasal dari keluarga susah yang akhirnya berjaya merantau ke UK setelah mendapat tawaran menyambung ijazah dalam aliran seni. Kisah bermula apabila beliau berjumpa dengan seorang gadis

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S2 - EP 14
programme.desc: Sembang Teh Tarik yang dikendalikan Datuk AC Mizal ia merupakan program 'talk show' yang terbaru dan santai sesuai untuk tontonan semua.

programme.desc: Komedi yang dipentaskan oleh gabungan pelawak tanahair menampilkan pelbagai isu berkaitan kesilapan yang sering berlaku dalam kehidupan seharian kita.

programme.title: Arena Panas : Pro VS Bro S1 - EP 1

programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.desc: Aathirai's unyielding passion for helping others constantly lands her in trouble, while Prabhu's self-serving actions show disregard for his own family's well-being. Follow their tumultuous journeys as fate brings them together in marriage.

programme.title: Moondru Mudichu
programme.desc: Nandini is a self-assured girl who puts her family’s happiness above hers. On the other hand Surya hates his mother due to lingering resentments and deliberately bonds with Nandini to cause strife. Watch what destiny has in store for Nandini & Surya.

programme.desc: Market Edge brings you the latest news in the stock market and currencies, while giving you a comprehensive look at economic developments all around Asia.

programme.title: Business Outlook
programme.desc: Business Outlook on ANC covers current economic trends and discussions with industry leaders on topics like energy transition and market growth.

programme.title: Ni Tabac Ni Cancer, Le Combat D'une Vie
programme.desc: Marie-Pierre Revel is a radiologist, a specialist in pulmonary diseases. For years she has been fighting against lung cancer, now the leading cause of cancer mortality among women. Her goal: to raise awareness among as many people as possible about the scourge of tobacco and to screen at-risk individuals through scans.

programme.title: Ex Utero
programme.desc: Navigating between history and contemporary testimonies, ''Ex utero'' crosses three time periods and three places: the Middle Ages in Belgium, the 18th century in Alabama and the 20th century in Auschwitz. In response to centuries of practices, women recount the gynaecological abuse they have suffered.

programme.title: L'invite

programme.title: Yetili - EP 45
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 46
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Fara - EP 11
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans ca - EP 39
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: C'est Mathematique ! Avec Iman - EP 1
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 4
programme.desc: The spectators go wild when Mouse takes the lead in the skateboarding competition: she manages a 1440, a figure no-one has ever successfully completed.

programme.title: Belfort & Lupin - EP 1
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 46
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 27
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 37
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 23
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 8
programme.desc: This painter and fashion photographer turns his painting into his own cinema. Between abstraction and figuration, Chris Carolina's work reveals a quest for purity, love and sincerity, with the figure of woman placed at the center of his reflections.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 7
programme.desc: Ibrahim has Down syndrome and has been working for eight years as a waiter at Le Reflet, an inclusive restaurant that employs people with disabilities. Born in France to Lebanese parents and trained in hospitality, he has built his path with rigor and determination, a story of autonomy and transmission.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 89
programme.desc: She's a huge star, a legend of French and world athletics. Double world champion, triple Olympic champion, an exceptional record in French sport: Marie-Josee Perec is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F - EP 11
programme.desc: Richard Orlinski explores francophone artistic creation, from the craftsmanship of Moulin Rouge costume designers to African urban dances. He meets Maxime Fontanier, workshop manager, and Mine Verges, director and living memory of the creation workshops of the legendary Parisian cabaret. Together, they reveal the rigor and meticulousness of the costume designers, feather workers and embroiderers who create the sumptuous revue costumes.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures - EP 4
programme.desc: An authority in the world of rafting, Derek Klapka accompanies tourists seeking both a challenge and spectacular scenery. In New Zealand, at the head of a group of rafters, he takes on the rapids of the Rangitikei River, where the prehistoric era seems ever-present.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 8
programme.desc: This painter and fashion photographer turns his painting into his own cinema. Between abstraction and figuration, Chris Carolina's work reveals a quest for purity, love and sincerity, with the figure of woman placed at the center of his reflections.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 10
programme.desc: In Boulogne-Billancourt, visit the Musee des Annees 30. Stefania Di Petrillo explores the emotional dimensions of design. Artistic director Pieter Mulier is following in the footsteps of the founder of the Alaia fashion house: sophistication at its best. The organic forms of an omnipresent nature are embodied in the creations of cabinetmaker Maxime Goleo.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 25

programme.title: Les Patins
programme.desc: Mina loves skating. Today, her father, recently divorced from her mother, is accompanying her to her first figure skating lesson...

programme.title: Un Apres-Midi a Se Fesser Dessus

programme.title: Nous, Les Europeens - EP 17
programme.desc: Since the 1970s, Italy has put an end to separate school institutions and integrates all children with disabilities into mainstream education, where they are supported by special needs teachers. Here, the disability of some is seen as a source of richness for the collective. In France, nearly 50,000 children with disabilities could not be accommodated at the start of the 2025 school year, despite laws and commitments...

programme.desc: The Pecourneaus are a close-knit farming family, determined, despite the accumulating debts, to save their farm. A series of unfortunate events plus a new European regulation combine to make their situation untenable. Their daughter emilie decides to publicise their story, to rally as many people as possible to their cause.

programme.title: L'instant Roland-Garros - EP 8
programme.desc: The daily roundup with full results, the best discussions and not-to-be missed highlights.

programme.title: Basik
programme.desc: The programme which explores and explains the economy, examines our relationship to money and analyses our purchasing power. The economic, social and environmental challenges of tomorrow are covered in a direct, down-to-earth and occasionally mischievous manner!

programme.title: A Bon Entendeur
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. The programme addresses economic, social, environmental and health issues and talks about leisure activities, technology...

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Vivement Dimanche
programme.desc: On his iconic red sofa, Michel Drucker welcomes and shines the spotlight on the talent of yesterday, today and tomorrow. A main guest talks about their career, their projects and their origins...

programme.title: Destination Francophonie - EP 8
programme.desc: Between Suriname and Brazil, French Guiana is the only French overseas department in South America, where nature and cultural diversity unfold just a few degrees from the equator. The adventure begins by pirogue on the Maroni River, discovering traditional Bushinengue villages. Papaichton, Belikampo, Saint-Laurent-du-Maroni, whose history remains marked by the penal colony. Javouhey, founded by Hmong refugees in the 1970s, the colorful town of Mana, then Kourou and its space center.

programme.title: Green - EP 1
programme.desc: We head to the heart of French Guiana, a territory where 97% of the land is covered by Amazonian forest. Antoine Auriol meets Philippe Lova Jah, Elvis, Mariana, Anais, Dave and Francisco, working to protect this natural treasure, and discovers the Kaw marshlands, veritable refuge for biodiversity.

programme.title: Movie - Jayam
programme.desc: A young woman's marriage is arranged with her first cousin by her parents during her childhood, but she falls in love with another guy. When the parents fix her marriage with the cousin, she elopes with her lover.

programme.title: Movie - Trip
programme.desc: A group of friends travelling in a dense forest accidentally meet two strangers who they think are killers. Things get complicated when they get caught by the real killers.

programme.title: LPGA Tour 2026 ShopRite LPGA powered by Wakefern Round 1 (Live)
programme.desc: The ShopRite LPGA Classic is a women's professional golf tournament on the LPGA Tour in Galloway, New Jersey, near Atlantic City. It took place annually from 1986 through 2006 and returned to the tour schedule in 2010 at the Bay Course at the Dolce Seaview Resort, with a prize fund of $1.75 million.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Europe Tour - CIC Tour de la Provence H/L
programme.desc: The Tour de la Provence is an annual early-season professional road cycling stage race held in the Provence region of southern France. The race is historically connected to the local French newspaper La Provence.

programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: PGA Championship 2026
programme.desc: The PGA Championship is an annual golf tournament conducted by the Professional Golfers' Association of America. The PGA is one of the 4 men's major golf championships. PGA champions are automatically invited to play in the other 3 majors and The Players Championship for the next 5 years, and are eligible for the PGA Championship for life. They receive membership on the PGA Tour and the European Tour for the following 5 seasons.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 24/25 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 10
programme.desc: Patrick Vieira revisits the defining moments of his legendary Premier League career, counting down the 10 greatest memories from his time in England. From fierce rivalries and title triumphs to unforgettable performances in midfield, Vieira reflects on the moments that shaped his legacy as one of the Premier League's all-time greats.

programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW38 Liverpool v Brentford
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW38 Fulham v Newcastle United
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW38 Burnley v Wolverhampton Wanderers
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 25
programme.desc: Ahead of the first North London derby of the season, we sit down with the man who made one of most controversial transfers in World football; Sol Campbell. He opens up about his decision to leave Tottenham for their fiercest rivals, Arsenal, the intense pressure of returning to White Hart Lane that first season, and how he's dealt with the fallout ever since. A fascinating insight into the 'move that shook North London'.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 24/25 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Bournemouth (MW01) - EP 1
programme.desc: Liverpool are unbeaten on the opening day in the last 12 PL seasons (W9, D3) - the longest ongoing run in PL.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Manchester City (MW01) - EP 6
programme.desc: No side has won more or scored more v Wolves at Molineaux than Man City over last 5 seasons.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Arsenal (MW01) - EP 9
programme.desc: Arsenal have won 2 of last 5 PL visits to Old Trafford (D1 L2) - had won only 1 of previous 18 PL visits (D6 L11).

programme.title: Manchester City vs Tottenham Hotspur (MW02) - EP 12
programme.desc: Erling Haaland has scored 48 goals in 48 home Premier League appearances for Man City. The only player to hit 50 Premier League home goals in fewer than 50 appearances is Alan Shearer, who scored his 50th home goal in his 47th game.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Leeds United (MW02) - EP 16
programme.desc: Arsenal are unbeaten in their last 14 meetings with Leeds in all competitions (W12 D2), winning each of the last six in a row.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Liverpool (MW02) - EP 20
programme.desc: Newcastle haven’t scored in any of their last four Premier League matches without Alexander Isak featuring (D2 L2), having 47 shots and accumulating an xG of 5.57 without scoring in these games.

programme.title: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Manchester City (MW03) - EP 28
programme.desc: Between 2017-18 and 2023-24, Brighton and Hove Albion only avoided defeat in two of 14 Premier League games against Man City (W1 D1 L12); last season, they didn’t lose against City, winning 2-1 at home and drawing 2-2 at the Etihad.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Liverpool (MW06) - EP 53
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have won just one of their last 16 Premier League meetings with Liverpool (D3 L12), winning 1-0 at Anfield in April 2024. The Eagles haven’t scored more than once in any of their last 12 league games against the Reds (6 goals).

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Manchester City (MW09) - EP 88
programme.desc: Aston Villa have won their last two home league games against Manchester City, last winning more consecutively between 1960 and 1975 (5).

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Arsenal (MW06) - EP 59
programme.desc: Newcastle have kept four clean sheets in their five Premier League games this season, conceding only in their 3-2 defeat to Liverpool. However, the Magpies have also failed to score in three of their five league games so far.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Arsenal (MW03) - EP 30
programme.desc: Liverpool are winless in six Premier League matches against Arsenal (D4 L2), their longest winless run against the Gunners since going eight without a win between October 2007 and April 2011.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Manchester United (MW04) - EP 40
programme.desc: Manchester City have won five of their last eight Premier League matches against Manchester United (D1 L2), though they failed to win either game (D1 L1) last season for the first time since 2020-21.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Manchester City (MW05) - EP 50
programme.desc: Arsenal have won two of their last four league meetings with Manchester City (D2), as many as their previous 22 beforehand (D5 L15). The Gunners could win back-to-back league games against the Citizens for the first time since December 2015.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Manchester United (MW08) - EP 79
programme.desc: Manchester United are winless in their last eight Premier League away games (D2 L6) since beating Leicester City 3-0 in March. The Red Devils last went longer without a league win on the road in September 1989 under Alex Ferguson (11).

programme.title: Arsenal vs Crystal Palace (MW09) - EP 86
programme.desc: Arsenal have won five of their last six Premier League meetings with Crystal Palace, though the exception was a 2-2 draw in this exact fixture last season.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Nottingham Forest (MW12) - EP 115
programme.desc: Liverpool lost this exact fixture 1-0 last season, the only league game in which they failed to score all season. They’ve not lost consecutive home league games against Nottingham Forest since 1963.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (MW12) - EP 119
programme.desc: Arsenal have won five of their last six Premier League games against Tottenham (D1), including the last three in a row. It’s their longest winning run against Spurs since a five game stretch between January 1987 and January 1989.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Liverpool (MW11) - EP 110
programme.desc: Liverpool won this exact fixture 2-0 last season but haven’t won consecutive away league games against Man City since a run of three between 1987 and 1991.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Dricus du Plessis vs. Martin Van Staden
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts headlined by a welterweight title fight between Dricus du Plessis and Martin Van Staden. Bonus coverage includes a lightweight battle between Mthobisi Buthelezi and Luke Michael and a bantamweight clash between Bill Thusi and Tjaart Henning.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Jermain Taylor vs. Kelly Pavlik
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-0, 17 KOs) making the 5th defense of his WBC and WBO Middleweight Titles, this time against upstart Kelly 'The Ghost' Pavlik (31-0, 28 KOs) on September 29, 2007 at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Javier Fortuna vs. Derrick Wilson
programme.desc: This episode features undefeated 20-year-old Dominican prospect Javier "El Abejon" Fortuna vs Derrick Wilson for the vacant WBC Youth World featherweight title, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Lamont Peterson vs. Amir Khan
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Lamont Peterson facing Amir Khan in a light welterweight title bout that ends in a controversial decision due to a point deduction. Also on the card, heavyweight kickboxing action.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. From the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena, in Tokyo, Japan, Show 4 features Kotoeko, Mitakeumi, Hakuho and Takanosho.

programme.title: Introducing:
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS Presents 'Introducing:', a new original documentary series that covers the current stars of today and rising stars of tomorrow. Each episode we get an up close and personal perspective of their lives and see what drives them to be the best at what they do. Introducing: Caitlin Dechelle, provides an intimate look at one of the most dominant women in the history of martial arts tournaments.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode brings you behind the scenes at the UFC Fan Expo with current UFC roster members Wanderlei Silva, Frank Mir and Donald "Cowboy" Cerrone. Two of the top corner men in the sport breakdown an MMA fight before our eyes. MMA:30 interviews the most popular ring girl in the game today, Arianny Celeste as she talks about her own MMA training exclusively on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: WCK

programme.title: WCCB Dina Thorslund vs. Seren Cetin
programme.desc: WBC & WBO Women's Bantamweight World Champion Dina Thorslund puts her titles and undefeated record on the line in front of her hometown fans at the Royal Arena in Copenhagen, Denmark, taking on top contender and undefeated challenger Seren Cetin of Turkey. Thorslund has held World Championship gold for over five years, including seven defenses of the WBO World Title before adding the WBC Championship in September.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Abu Dhabi Grand Slam on world Judo day, we speak to double world champion Mayra Aguiar about the unity of the Brazilian judo team, and watch as two world champions battle for gold in the -57kg division.

programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of multiple-weight world champions, as Juan Manuel Marquez challenges Marco Antonio Barrera for the WBC super featherweight title.

programme.desc: Laa-Laa and Po play a game of 'hide and seek'. They both take turns at hiding. Tinky Winky and Dispsy are hiding too and Laa-Laa and Po find them together.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S5) - EP 9
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'plate' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today's episode is all about plates!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 13
programme.desc: After accidentally causing a mini avalanche, Messy must help Lofty dig out the entrance to his cave.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 20
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19

programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S1) - EP 1

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: When Bluey visits the markets with five bucks from the tooth fairy, the options are endless. But as she and Indy look for the perfect purchase, spending it proves hard.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 23
programme.desc: During a game of Queens, Bluey and Bingo find that playing the butler is much more fun. But someone must play the queen, even if it means not being afraid of a bit of hard work.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Andy heads to Dragon's Breath Cave, in Africa, to track down a catfish and take its photo.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch needs some help from the Playtimers to make hoopy owl bagels. It's time for a tasty adventure!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 47
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 46
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins, come to visit.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 45

programme.desc: The Go Jetters help Grandmaster Glitch take his own souvenir selfies across Europe.

programme.desc: Umbrella needs Sarah and Duck's help after he promises to put on a magic show.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 109
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: When General Morando and Colonel Kubritz attack the Mothership, Team Tarron must fight to protect the King and Queen’s Cores and their lives… with shocking, fatal results.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: Aja and Krel travel into their parents’ memories in pursuit of Morando - and the truth about Gaylen’s Core. But when the King and Queen’s lives are jeopardized, a trusted ally makes a sacrifice that will change the team forever.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: With their parents nearly regenerated and Morando in pursuit of Gaylen’s Core, Aja, Krel, and Vex unite with Toby and Arrgh on a quest into the depths of Trollmarket to unearth the relic before it ends up in the wrong hands.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: Skid unleashes an evil robot on Turbotown and has to get rid of the monster himself; Turbo falls for and betroths a head-eating mantis princess.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: White Shadow is mistaken for a celebrity snail and kidnapped; Tito gets a foosball table which quickly becomes a soccer battle ground.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing Is Here! S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: When Archibald loses his last baby tooth, he wants to hold onto it forever. programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing Is Here! S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: After stumbling into Finly’s music performance, Archibald’s unique sound leads to a hit record. programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 39

Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 1

programme.desc: The SVU must determine fact from fantasy when a famous author twists the details of a serious crime. Fin has a challenging day at work.

programme.desc: When a man claims his girlfriend was kidnapped, Bruno investigates the holes in his story. Tynan comes down hard on Benson after a disagreement. Griffin must defend his policework on the stand.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 9
programme.desc: The hunt for a murder suspect uncovers a crime with shocking legal and ethical implications. Bruno must protect his squad during a raid on a suspect’s home. Carisi and Price team up in court when Brady’s interrogation tactics undermine the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 10
programme.desc: An attempt on a respected judge’s life is connected to an anonymous video posted to the SVU tip line. Rollins tries to help a victim come to terms with their abuse.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 11
programme.desc: When Curry’s son finds a disturbing cassette tape in a thrift store haul, she and Benson must investigate a decades-old missing persons case. Griffin learns a disturbing rumor about his father.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 12
programme.desc: The hunt for a murder suspect uncovers a crime with shocking legal and ethical implications. Bruno must protect his squad during a raid on a suspect’s home. Carisi and Price team up in court when Brady’s interrogation tactics undermine the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 13
programme.desc: A teenager rescued from a dangerous situation begs Benson to help reunite her with her father. Carisi and CJ take the foster care system to task for separating families without sufficient proof.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 14
programme.desc: A family discovers a young boy in grave danger when their baby monitor picks up a rogue frequency. Griffin goes to extremes to find the boy’s location. Rollins finds herself alone with a predator.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 15
programme.desc: Reports of an assault by a guest at a celebrity fan convention leads to a murder investigation. Tynan presents Capt. Curry with a career opportunity.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 16
programme.desc: With little evidence to guide them, the SVU steps in when a woman undergoing psychedelic-assisted therapy recovers a buried memory of assault. Curry starts a new position at SVU.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 17
programme.desc: Benson is shocked to find undercover Det. Velasco at the center of a sex trafficking bust. When more women are smuggled into the city, a rescued victim begs SVU to help save her sister.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27 - EP 18
programme.desc: A mysterious death in a hotel leads the squad into the world of professional fighting. Benson tries to convince a victim to come forward for the sake of his friend.

programme.desc: An unconscious and injured teen abandoned outside a hospital sends the SVU on a search for the people who left her there. Benson faces serious consequences when she chooses to protect a victim’s secret under the pressure of cross examination.

programme.desc: Sebastien Martin and his friend Chef Francois Audrin travel through Kochi Prefecture, visiting local farms and wineries, discovering inspiration from the producers' commitment and unique food culture.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 2
programme.desc: James Dainard and his team try to make the grade when they partner with Bre, a college professor and aspiring flipper, to revive a rundown farmhouse in his old neighbourhood.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays - EP 4
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent "Fundue" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something - EP 3
programme.desc: The two adventurers follow the mountaineer deep into the remote areas of Jiri Mountain. They experience a feast with makgeolli (Korean rice wine) and local mountain folk.

programme.title: Mama's Little Murderer
programme.desc: Devoted single mother Constance struggles to balance her newfound love with Leo and the obsessive, destructive behaviour of her son, Anthony, who will go to extreme lengths to keep her to himself.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: Monica starts a crowdsource fund to pay for the hospital bills after her daughter is injured. But as a seemingly attractive and generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: ALF S2 - EP 15
programme.desc: ALF insists on helping the Tanners with their involvement in the neighborhood watch. After he joins the block patrol, ALF cried sheep so many times that no one believes him when he spots a burglar .

programme.title: ALF S2 - EP 16
programme.desc: Willie tries to save ALF from the SWAT team before they storm the house. Trapped, ALF uses multiple voices to make the police think the mystery burglar has taken hostages.

programme.title: ALF S2 - EP 17
programme.desc: ALF tries to be a "seeing-eye alien" for his blind friend, Jody, whom he invites to live in his home when her building is under renovation. To avoid imposing on the Tanners, Jody soon finds a place of her own.

programme.title: CSI S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a supermarket. In the store, Grissom finds a bathroom stall door that claims five women have been killed.

programme.title: CSI S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: A man about to go on trial for arson and the murder of his wife and child seeks assistance from Grissom to help prove his innocence.

programme.title: CSI S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in an office building killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1

programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
programme.desc: With a $4.6 trillion balance sheet, JPMorgan is more valuable than its three biggest rivals combined. And much of the bank’s success is arguably due to its long-time leader, Jamie Dimon.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns

The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world._x000D__x000D__x000D_

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling. The program provides a unique platform for the best current affairs documentaries from around the globe. Big Story aims to present the contemporary world and China’s global perspectives on the contemporary world to an international audience.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. programme.desc: Most commercial honey in Japan comes from Western honeybees whose honey can be harvested several times a year - Japanese honeybees are much less productive, but keeping them can be a real education.

programme.title: Sweet Stranger and Me - EP 11
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. She doesn't trust him much at first, but as time passes by, she accepts him as family. This new father is always on her side. He loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.title: My Run, My Way - EP 11

programme.title: Our Happy Days - EP 39
programme.desc: A perfectionist architect and a cheerful AI developer clash over a business takeover. As their lives intertwine, they navigate family rivalries and corporate stakes to find unexpected comfort and love.

programme.title: Hit the Top - EP 8
programme.desc: In the year 1993, K-pop idol Yoo Hyunjae accidentally travels through time to the year 2017. Discovering that he is presumed dead, he begins to investigate what exactly has happened while trying to adjust to life in the 21st century.

programme.title: Strongest Deliveryman - EP 8
programme.desc: This story depicts the love and success of a self-made jajangmyeon delivery man born with a plastic spoon in his mouth.

programme.title: The Seasons W
programme.desc: When the end of one week meets the start of another week, this talk show will bring you music and stories that soothe your worries and concerns.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar - EP 27
programme.desc: In this bold yet heartbreaking story, a mother and daughter-in-law meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Problem Child in House - EP 53
programme.desc: This is a great "knowledge talk show" where problematic children who are struggling and fighting in the emotional rooftop room gain true wisdom about life and the world.

programme.title: Recipe for Love - EP 30

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life - EP 5
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family "reboot" drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After Lam Ching’s past is exposed by the media, Yeung-tin’s family members try their best to persuade him to stay away from her. But Yeung-tin is not listening. While drowning his sorrows alone, Hok-yin runs into Ko Ching, who has come to recover car repair costs. Hok-yin wrongly thinks she is his late mother.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 12
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Fong International Chairman Fong Yeung-tin and his mother Mdm Fong Luk Chiu-kwan engage each other in a legal battle as they disagree on the issue of setting up a family trust. Rewind one year, and Fong director Kwong Wai-leung buys some special edition bling form Chung Tak Jewellry, But he discovers it’s a fake, so he vents his anger on Yeung-tin’s eldest son Fong Hok-lai.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After the traffic accident, no one knows if Yeung-tin is dead or alive. To stabilize Fong share price and prevent Chiu-kwan from worrying, Hok-lai and Hok-kan and their third younger bother Fong Hok-yin decide to suppress the news about Yeung-tin falling into a coma. Hok-lai openly apologizes for the Grandpa Wong incident and promises to pay compensation.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The Fongs are in turmoil. Hok-lai and Hok-kan are at their wits’ end in the face of a hostile takeover of their company. Yeung-tin is in a coma. Hok-lai’s uncle Tung Yau-wai seems to secretly hope that Yeung-tin will never come round. Yeung-tin’s buddy Lam Ching disguises herself as a nurse and sneaks into the ward.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 4
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sin-chuen, in her capacity as an ex-girlfriend, visits Ko Sham in the evening. After seeing the doctor, Yeung-tin decides to leave hospital and return to Hong Kong. To prevent the fake jewelry incident from being exposed, Yau-wai gives money to Lai Chung-hing, who is the manager involved, so that he leaves Hong Kong quickly.

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] After Lam Ching’s past is exposed by the media, Yeung-tin’s family members try their best to persuade him to stay away from her. But Yeung-tin is not listening. While drowning his sorrows alone, Hok-yin runs into Ko Ching, who has come to recover car repair costs. Hok-yin wrongly thinks she is his late mother.

programme.title: Honour - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 6
programme.desc: Kang So-young attacks Gang-heon at his weakest link. Pan-ho evades Gang-heon’s watch for a lunch appointment, but he meets an unexpected figure.

programme.title: Light of Dawn - EP 18
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A car accident uncovers a set of long-buried remains, binding orphan Gao Feng (Zhang Ruoyun) and wealthy heiress Wu Feifei (Ma Sichun) together. To unravel the mystery of their origins, they join forces with the police to dig up hidden darkness under the city.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 13
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 14
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: Double Happiness - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Xu Kai Xin (Zhang Yu Qi), single mother of two, and Mei Cheng Yi (Han Geng), a single father of two, as they navigate the chaos of parenting four kids, growing closer through life’s unpredictable twists.

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 7
programme.desc: As a heated argument breaks out between the father and son, Pan-ho begins to question if Kim Sang-hyun’s death was truly an accident.

programme.title: Wonderland of Love - EP 13
programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.desc: The emperor's grandson Li Ni (Xu Kai) is forced to take on the responsibility of quelling the rebellion. He meets the ambitious Cui Lin (Jing Tian), who is the General’s daughter under disguise. They cross paths on the battlefields and fall in love.

programme.title: The Last Immortal - EP 1
programme.desc: The story tells the story of Gu Jin, the son of the true god, and Ayin, the water-condensing beast, who work together to save the people of the three realms.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 38
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: The Unclouded Soul - EP 39
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A carefree young woman, Xiao Yao (Tan Songyun), wanders by mistake into the Valley of Ten Thousand Demons and stirs up turmoil, becoming entangled with the Demon King Hong Ye (Hou Minghao) as the two are swept into a series of mysterious and uncanny cases.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. They tackle bizarre cases from haunted temples to court plots, culminating in a polo match that tests their fates.

programme.title: Strange Tales of Tang Dynasty III to Changan - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Amid Chang'an's power shifts, Lu Lingfeng and Su Wuming lead their detective team back to the capital, turning a teahouse into a covert base. programme.title: Honour - EP 11
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Three lifelong friends turned elite lawyers work at a firm defending female crime victims. Their unshakeable bond is tested when a buried 20-year secret resurfaces amid explosive cases.

programme.title: Your Honor - EP 8
programme.desc: Lee Cheong-gang testifies against Kim Sang-hyuk in court. Pan-ho meets Gang-heon in an attempt to lure him into a trap, but the conversation takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 2
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse._x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead. _x000D__x000D_ LUNG’s only son, SAN (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) serves in the army. The family has not heard from him for a long time and assumes that he is dead.

programme.title: Tiger Mom Blues - EP 18
programme.desc: Raised by "Tiger Mom" YUE KAI-YIN (Michelle Yim), stay-at-home mom CHA HEUNG-SIN (Elena Kong), who is deeply influenced by her strict upbringing, adopts an autocratic parenting style to raise her two daughters, leading to resentment among them, especially her elder daughter YIM SIN-YUE (Kong Ka Man). The two are always at each other's throats.

programme.title: Treasure of Destiny - EP 10
programme.desc: Pork butcher stall lady boss Chu Ying-kiu (Katy Kung) has innate mystical power. But she is inflicted with some strange illness that causes her to grow a beard. She hopes to find the elixir mentioned in Sutra of Forty-two Chapters for treating her illness. Over the years, university Chinese language professor Cheung King (Moses Chan) has been passionate about finding this legendary treasure. However, he has been suffering from insomnia as he was devastated in an incident.

programme.title: Legend Of Demigods - EP 13
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 3
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. However, their success upsets a junket promoter-turned-land developer, KO TIN-TSAU (Hugo Ng), who keeps suppressing them. WAI-SHUN is even betrayed by his close confidant TSU CHI-LIK (Mat Yeung).

programme.title: Brother's Keeper II - EP 4
programme.desc: Overcoming adversity, LAW WAI-SHUN (Edwin Siu) and YIU MAN-YING (Kristal Tin) successfully develop the business of Lo Son Kei and make it famous in both Hong Kong and Macau. programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 9
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction._x000D__x000D_It turned out that Yee was in fact the step-sister of Shek’s wife Shan (So Yuk Wah). She blamed Shan’s mother for taking her father away and she swore to take revenge. She seduced Shek and made him divorce Shan.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 13
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 16
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 17
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 39
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 39
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: The Conquest - EP 40
programme.desc: During the Spring and Autumn Period, ancient China was divided into small kingdoms ruled by various powerful regional warlords. This was a time of massive upheaval when a myriad of dramatic stories took place. The more than 20-year-long fight among the man of virtue FAN LAI (CHEN KUN), the persistent and dauntless AU TSIN (LAU CHUNG YAN, DAMIAN), the legendary hero FU CHAI (MA TAK CHUNG, JOE) and the mesmerizing beauty SAI SZE (KWOK, SONIJA) is a true classic that will long be remembered.

programme.title: ONE GOOD TURN DESERVES ANOTHER - EP 9
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Yee (Maggie Cheung) was held responsible for murdering a millionaire for his estate. She employed Shek (Chan Kai Tai) to defend for her. Shek was attracted to her mysterious background and fell for her seduction._x000D__x000D_It turned out that Yee was in fact the step-sister of Shek’s wife Shan (So Yuk Wah). She blamed Shan’s mother for taking her father away and she swore to take revenge. She seduced Shek and made him divorce Shan.

programme.title: Colourful Life - EP 13
programme.desc: The CHENG family has been running a business in the dyeing industry for several generations. Master CHENG and his wife died early. His mistress, SHUI KWUN DING FUNG (TSUI SUJK YEE), has since been running the business and keeps the family in shape._x000D__x000D_The eldest son, CHI SHING (LAW MONG), is a simple and straightforward person. He has a good and helpful wife, CHOW MONA (SO YUK WAH, LOUISA). The second son, CHI POK (YUEN SIU CHEUNG, LOUIS), is a short-tempered man.

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 16
programme.desc: High-end AI robot Bo (Ali Lee) accidentally loses her way while she is being shipped from the factory. She eventually ends up among a family of weirdos in the realm of human beings. AI company employee Koo Ka-lim (6 Wing) thinks he has found some treasure and arbitrarily keeps Bo for himself. To help four family members in the Koo household handle all kinds of strange tasks, Bo switches on her self-learning function and begins to experience myriad human emotions and desires.
